name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: Centralized portal offering scholarships from central and state governments for students across India.
benefits: Financial assistance for tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other academic expenses.

name: PM Scholarship Scheme
description: Scholarship for wards of ex-servicemen/ex-coast guard personnel for professional degree courses.
benefits: Rs 3,000/month for boys and Rs 3,600/month for girls for the duration of the course.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship (Girls)
description: Scholarship for girl students pursuing technical education in AICTE approved institutions.
benefits: Rs 50,000 per annum for tuition fees and incidentals.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
description: Scholarship for differently-abled students in AICTE approved technical institutions.
benefits: Rs 50,000 per annum for tuition and incidentals.

name: Central Sector Scholarship Scheme
description: Merit-based scholarship for college and university students from economically weaker sections.
benefits: Rs 10,000-20,000 per annum at graduation level, Rs 20,000 at post-graduation.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship
description: Innovation in Science Pursuit for Inspired Research – scholarship for science students.
benefits: Rs 80,000 per annum for pursuing BSc/BS/Int MSc courses in natural and basic sciences.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC
description: Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC students studying in post-matriculation or post-secondary courses.
benefits: Full tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other allowances.

name: Minority Scholarship Scheme
description: Pre and post matric scholarship for students belonging to minority communities.
benefits: Tuition fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance.

name: Vidyalakshmi Education Loan Scheme
description: Portal providing information and access to education loans from multiple banks.
benefits: Education loans with subsidized interest rates for economically weaker students.

name: National Means Cum Merit Scholarship
description: Scholarship for meritorious students of economically weaker sections to reduce dropouts at class 8.
benefits: Rs 12,000 per annum from class 9 to class 12.

name: UGC Post Graduate Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students pursuing post-graduate studies in university departments.
benefits: Rs 3,100/month for humanities, Rs 7,800/month for sciences for 2 years.

name: PM Research Fellowship
description: Direct entry fellowship for BTech students into PhD programmes at IITs and IISc.
benefits: Rs 70,000-80,000/month fellowship with research grant of Rs 2 lakh/year.

name: Digital India Internship Scheme
description: Internship opportunities for students in various government digital initiatives.
benefits: Stipend of Rs 10,000/month, certificate, and hands-on experience in government projects.

name: KVPY Fellowship (Science Students)
description: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana – fellowship for students interested in basic science research.
benefits: Monthly fellowship of Rs 5,000-7,000 plus annual contingency grant.

name: State Merit Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships offered by individual state governments for domicile students.
benefits: Varies by state – typically Rs 5,000-25,000/year based on merit and category.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Campaign to generate awareness and improve efficiency of welfare services for girls.
benefits: Awareness campaigns, improved girl child birth ratio, education support for girls.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child with high interest rate and tax benefits.
benefits: High interest rate (8%+), tax exemption under 80C, maturity at age 21.

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Cash incentive for pregnant and lactating women for first live birth.
benefits: Rs 5,000 in three installments for first live birth.

name: Mahila E-Haat
description: Online marketing platform for women entrepreneurs to showcase and sell their products.
benefits: Free online marketplace, direct access to customers, marketing support for women-made products.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs.
benefits: Composite loan for setting up greenfield enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading.

name: Ujjwala Yojana (LPG)
description: Free LPG connections to women from BPL households.
benefits: Free LPG connection, deposit-free, and first refill free.

name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
description: Safe and affordable hostel accommodation for working women in cities.
benefits: Subsidized hostel accommodation with day care facility for children.

name: One Stop Centre Scheme
description: Support for women affected by violence – integrated services under one roof.
benefits: Medical aid, legal aid, counselling, temporary shelter, police facilitation.
documents: Any ID Proof (optional – services available without documents)

name: Annapurna Scheme (Women)
description: Food security scheme providing free foodgrains to destitute senior women.
benefits: 10 kg of foodgrains per month free of cost to eligible senior women.

name: Mudra Loan for Women
description: Collateral-free loans for women entrepreneurs under Mudra scheme.
benefits: Loans up to Rs 10 lakh without collateral – Shishu (50K), Kishore (5L), Tarun (10L).

name: Mahila Shakti Kendra
description: Community engagement through student volunteers in underserved districts for women empowerment.
benefits: Skill development, digital literacy, health & nutrition awareness for rural women.

name: Dena Shakti Scheme
description: Concessional loans for women in agriculture, education, housing, and micro-credit.
benefits: Loans up to Rs 20 lakh at concessional interest rate (0.25% below base rate).

name: STEP Scheme
description: Support to Training and Employment Programme for women – skill upgradation in traditional sectors.
benefits: Free training in agriculture, horticulture, food processing, handlooms, tailoring, and more.

name: Rashtriya Mahila Kosh
description: Micro-credit for poor women through NGOs and Self-Help Groups.
benefits: Loans at low interest for income-generating activities through SHGs and NGOs.

name: Nirbhaya Fund
description: Fund for projects related to women's safety including one-stop centres and women helplines.
benefits: Access to women helpline (181), one-stop centres, safe city projects, emergency response.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of Rs 6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families.
benefits: Rs 6,000 per year in three equal installments directly to bank account.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Credit facility for farmers to meet agricultural and other needs.
benefits: Short-term credit at subsidized interest rate (4% p.a.), Rs 3 lakh limit.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health cards to farmers with crop-wise nutrient recommendations.
benefits: Free soil testing, customized fertilizer recommendations, improved crop yield.

name: e-NAM
description: Electronic National Agriculture Market – online trading platform for agricultural produce.
benefits: Transparent price discovery, direct sale to buyers, reduced middlemen, better prices for farmers.

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
description: Irrigation support scheme to provide water to every farm (Har Khet Ko Paani).
benefits: Subsidies on micro-irrigation, drip irrigation systems, water harvesting structures.

name: Dairy Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
description: Scheme to promote dairy farming and entrepreneurship in dairy sector.
benefits: Subsidy of 25-33% for dairy units, calf rearing, milk processing equipment.

name: National Livestock Mission
description: Development of livestock sector including poultry, sheep, goat, and pig farming.
benefits: Subsidy up to 50% for establishing livestock farms and feed units.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: Promotes organic farming by forming clusters of farmers.
benefits: Rs 50,000/hectare for 3 years for organic farming inputs, certification, and marketing.

name: Agri Infrastructure Fund
description: Financing facility for post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets.
benefits: Interest subvention of 3% on loans up to Rs 2 crore for agri-infrastructure.

name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
description: Scheme for sustainable development of fisheries sector.
benefits: Subsidy of 40-60% for fish farming, fish feed plant, cold storage, and boats.

name: Farm Mechanization Scheme
description: Subsidy on purchase of farm machinery and equipment.
benefits: Subsidy of 40-50% on tractors, harvesters, tillers, and other farm equipment.

name: PM KUSUM Scheme
description: Solar energy scheme for farmers – solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants.
benefits: Subsidy up to 60% for solar pumps, additional income from solar power generation.

name: Organic Farming Subsidy
description: Government subsidy for farmers transitioning to organic farming practices.
benefits: Financial assistance for organic inputs, certification costs, and market linkage support.

name: Startup India Scheme
description: Government initiative to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups.
benefits: Tax exemption for 3 years, self-certification compliance, patent fee rebate, fund of funds access.

name: Stand-Up India (SC/ST)
description: Bank loans for SC/ST entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises.
benefits: Composite loan between Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for SC/ST entrepreneurs.

name: Mudra Loan (PMMY)
description: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 10 lakh for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Shishu (up to 50K), Kishore (50K-5L), Tarun (5L-10L) – no collateral needed.

name: Atal Innovation Mission (AIM)
description: Promoting innovation and entrepreneurship through Atal Tinkering Labs and Incubation Centres.
benefits: Grant of Rs 10 crore for incubation centres, Rs 20 lakh for tinkering labs.

name: CGTMSE
description: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises – collateral-free loans.
benefits: Guarantee cover up to Rs 5 crore for MSE loans without collateral or third-party guarantee.

name: PMEGP
description: Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme for setting up micro enterprises.
benefits: Subsidy of 15-35% of project cost for manufacturing (up to 50L) and service (up to 20L).

name: SIDBI Fund Support
description: SIDBI's Fund of Funds for startups and MSMEs through venture capital.
benefits: Equity and quasi-equity funding through SIDBI-registered venture funds.

name: Digital MSME Scheme
description: Cloud computing and ICT adoption support for MSMEs.
benefits: Subsidy on cloud computing, ICT tools, and digital infrastructure for MSMEs.

name: Credit Linked Capital Subsidy
description: Capital subsidy for technology upgradation of MSMEs.
benefits: 15% capital subsidy on institutional credit up to Rs 1 crore for technology upgradation.

name: ASPIRE Scheme
description: Scheme for Promotion of Innovation, Rural Industry and Entrepreneurship.
benefits: Livelihood business incubators, technology business incubators for rural innovation.

name: National SC/ST Hub
description: Support to SC/ST entrepreneurs for participating in public procurement.
benefits: Financial support, capacity building, and market linkage for SC/ST enterprises.

name: GeM Registration
description: Government e-Marketplace – online platform for public procurement of goods and services.
benefits: Access to government procurement orders, transparent bidding, timely payments.

name: EPFO Scheme
description: Employees' Provident Fund – social security scheme for salaried employees.
benefits: Provident fund accumulation, pension after retirement, insurance coverage.

name: ESIC Scheme
description: Employees' State Insurance – medical and cash benefits for workers earning up to Rs 21,000/month.
benefits: Medical care, sickness benefit, maternity benefit, disablement benefit, dependant benefit.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers with government co-contribution.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of Rs 1,000-5,000/month after age 60.

name: PM Shram Yogi Maandhan
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers with monthly income below Rs 15,000.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 3,000 after age 60.

name: National Career Service
description: Online portal connecting job seekers with employers, counsellors, and training providers.
benefits: Free job matching, career counselling, skill development resources, job fairs.

name: Skill India Mission
description: Umbrella scheme for skill development including PMKVY, apprenticeship, and industrial training.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, placement support across 40+ sectors.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Skill development scheme enabling youth to take up industry-relevant skill training.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, and placement assistance.

name: e-Shram Portal
description: National database of unorganized workers for social security benefits.
benefits: Accidental insurance of Rs 2 lakh, access to welfare schemes.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering coverage at premium of Rs 436 per annum.
benefits: Life insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh at Rs 436/year premium.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental insurance scheme at Rs 20 per annum premium.
benefits: Rs 2 lakh for accidental death/full disability, Rs 1 lakh for partial disability.

name: PM Rojgar Protsahan Yojana
description: Government pays employer's EPS/EPFO contribution for new employees.
benefits: Government pays 12% employer EPFO contribution for new hires earning up to Rs 15,000/month.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Stipend support to establishments for engaging apprentices.
benefits: Government shares 25% of stipend (up to Rs 1,500/month) with employers for apprentices.

name: Building & Construction Workers Welfare
description: Welfare benefits for registered building and construction workers.
benefits: Pension, health insurance, education assistance for children, housing loans, maternity benefit.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
description: Monthly pension for BPL senior citizens above 60 years.
benefits: Rs 200-500/month pension from central government + state top-up.

name: Varishtha Pension Bima Yojana
description: Pension scheme by LIC with guaranteed return for senior citizens.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of 8% per annum with monthly/quarterly/annual payout options.

name: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
description: Provides physical aids and assisted living devices to senior citizens belonging to BPL category.
benefits: Free walking sticks, hearing aids, wheelchairs, spectacles for BPL senior citizens.

name: Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
description: Savings scheme with attractive interest rates for senior citizens.
benefits: Interest rate of 8.2% p.a., quarterly payouts, tax benefits under 80C.

name: Annapurna Scheme (Senior Citizens)
description: Free foodgrains for eligible senior citizens who are not covered under old age pension.
benefits: 10 kg of foodgrains per month free of cost.

name: Integrated Programme for Older Persons
description: Financial assistance to NGOs running old age homes, day care, and mobile medicare.
benefits: Access to old age homes, day care centres, physiotherapy, mobile health units.

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
description: World's largest health assurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh coverage per family per year.
benefits: Free hospitalization up to Rs 5 lakh/year at empanelled hospitals, cashless treatment.

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana
description: Health insurance for BPL families covering hospitalization expenses.
benefits: Insurance cover of Rs 30,000/year for BPL families for hospitalization.

name: Mission Indradhanush
description: Immunization programme to cover all children under 2 years and pregnant women.
benefits: Free vaccination for 12 diseases including polio, measles, hepatitis B, and more.

name: National Health Mission
description: Umbrella programme providing accessible, affordable healthcare to rural and urban poor.
benefits: Free healthcare services at government hospitals, ASHA workers, mobile medical units.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Cash assistance to pregnant women for institutional delivery.
benefits: Rs 700-1400 cash assistance for delivery at government hospitals.

name: Free Dialysis Program
description: Free dialysis services for BPL patients at district hospitals under PPP model.
benefits: Free haemodialysis sessions at government hospitals for economically weaker patients.

name: TB Free India Mission
description: Nutritional support and incentive to TB patients during treatment.
benefits: Rs 500/month nutritional support via DBT for TB patients during treatment period.

name: National Mental Health Programme
description: Accessible mental healthcare services at district level across India.
benefits: Free mental health treatment, counselling, and psychiatric services at district hospitals.

name: Unique Disability ID (UDID)
description: Universal ID for persons with disabilities to avail benefits of government schemes.
benefits: Single document for availing all disability-related benefits and concessions.

name: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme
description: Financial assistance to NGOs for rehabilitation services for persons with disabilities.
benefits: Vocational training, special education, rehabilitation services for disabled persons.

name: Accessible India Campaign
description: Making public spaces, transport, and ICT accessible for persons with disabilities.
benefits: Accessible buildings, transport, websites, and public facilities for disabled persons.

name: ADIP Scheme
description: Assistance to Disabled Persons for purchase/fitting of aids and appliances.
benefits: Free aids and appliances like hearing aids, wheelchairs, prosthetics, Braille kits.

name: National Handicapped Finance Development Corporation
description: Concessional loans for self-employment ventures by persons with disabilities.
benefits: Loans up to Rs 25 lakh at low interest for self-employment of disabled persons.

name: Disability Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for persons with severe disabilities (80%+).
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 300-500 from central government + state contribution.
